headline: What Makes Exelon Corp. (EXC) a Deep Value Utility Holding?
summary: Heartland Advisors, an investment management company, released its first-quarter 2026 investor letter for “Heartland Mid Cap Value Fund”. A copy of the letter can be downloaded here. Mid-cap stocks experienced initial gains due to improved market breadth; however, increasing geopolitical risks led investors to favor larger-cap companies perceived as safer.
